tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Windows down on the backroad
Dust trail behind us like a golden cloud
Your boots up on the dashboard
Singing every word out way too loud

[Pre-Chorus]
Summer don't last forever
But tonight it feels like it could
Just you, me, and this weather
Living like we always should

[Chorus]
Backroad summer nights
Fireflies and neon lights
Cold drink in my hand
You're the best-laid plan
Backroad summer nights
Everything just feels so right
Let the whole world wait
We got time to waste
On backroad summer nights

[Verse 2]
Tailgate down by the river
Blanket spread under a sky of stars
Your head laid on my shoulder
Counting all the ways we got this far

[Pre-Chorus]
Summer don't last forever
But tonight it feels like it could
Just you, me, and this weather
Living like we always should

[Chorus]
Backroad summer nights
Fireflies and neon lights
Cold drink in my hand
You're the best-laid plan
Backroad summer nights
Everything just feels so right
Let the whole world wait
We got time to waste
On backroad summer nights

[Bridge]
I don't need the city
I don't need the noise
Just this gravel singing
Underneath our joy

[Outro]
Backroad summer nights
Backroad summer nights
